name: chain_remote_assistant_work_as_a_side_hustle
method: Remote assistant work as a side hustle

stages.task: Scrape Reddit r/forhire r/remotework r/SideHustle + freelance boards for VA/remote assistant postings with budget >$20/hr
Score leads by: hourly rate, task automability (email/data entry/scheduling = high), recurring potential, client size
Generate AI-augmented proposals emphasizing 2x speed delivery via automation, route to EAS outbound pipeline
